questionHtml: Draw lines on the diagram to complete wavefronts A and B in water for θ < θmax.
markschemeHtml:
correct orientation

greater separation

 

Do not penalize the lengths of A and B in the water

Do not penalize a wavefront for C if it is consistent with A and B

MP1 must be awarded for MP2 to be awarded

[2 marks]

meta.title: Draw lines on the diagram to complete wavefronts A and B in water for θ < θmax.
